title: Manticore

'''''Manticore''''' was one of four [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] stationed at the [[Maw Installation]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Brusc]] as part of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] squadron.

==History==
After the escape of the [[Sun Crusher]] and the destruction of one of her [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], the [[Hydra (Imperial I-class)|''Hydra'']], Daala led her remaining three vessels on a [[Daala campaign|guerrilla campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The ''Manticore'' participated in combat actions against a New Republic colony on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] and at the [[Attack on Mon Calamari|assault]] on the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] homeworld of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. During that particular attack, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] remotely piloted the [[Cruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]] ''[[Startide]]''—with assistance from attacking [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]—into a collision with the ''Manticore'', destroying it. All hands, including [[Brusc]], were lost.

==Description==
An [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] stationed at the [[Maw Installation]] by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]], the ''Manticore'' was under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Brusc]]. It was destroyed in the attack on Mon Calamari when [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] used the half-constructed star cruiser [[Startide]] to ram the ship.
